ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES. THE COURT VACATES THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BASED ON THE STATEMENT OF MS. MAGALLANES. THERE IS AN ISSUE WHETHER OR NOT PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT DUE TO LACK OF CLARITY. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2020 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Continued To Oct-27-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: VIVIAN LEUNG LERCHE appearing specially for Plaintiff. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-24-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: ANDREW Y.S. CHENG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Evelyn Magallanes 415-905-0093 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues she cannot afford attorney's fees. The Court tries to call Atty. Kenosian on the phone but there was no answer. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling. The Court Denies the motion for entry of judgment based on the statement of Ms. Magallanes. There is an issue whether or not parties have reached an agreement due to lack of clarity. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
